internal_issues.description: Evaluation Guide Principle 3 overclaims cosmological neutrality
internal_issues.fix_details: Principle 3 heading reworded: 'Claims are evaluated against measurement, not against theoretical authority.' Added explicit acknowledgment of measurement infrastructure asymmetry (NOAA/Gaia/IGRF/GPS). TLDR updated to match.

internal_issues.fix_details: Eclipse paragraph now acknowledges: ranges overlap for 17-20 nT; only >20 nT favors dome; discriminating window ~1 nT reflects derivative methodology.
